description_long: This humanoid robot features a friendly, cartoon-like face with glasses and a wide-brimmed hat, mounted on a cylindrical neck and a rounded yellow torso. Its arms are long, segmented, and extend horizontally, ending in flat, paddle-like hands with visible finger segments. The robot's lower body is integrated into a wheeled base, suggesting mobility, with two large wheels on either side and a central support. Colorful cables are visible connecting the torso to the arms, adding a mechanical and functional aesthetic. The robot's chest and base display various mechanical details, including a panel with a biohazard symbol and a keyhole, hinting at access or maintenance points. The overall design is sleek and approachable, blending metallic and plastic materials with a playful, service-oriented appearance.
description: A friendly humanoid robot with a cartoon face, wide-brimmed hat, yellow torso, and long segmented arms, mounted on a wheeled base with visible cables and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's face, glasses, hat, yellow torso, outstretched arms, and wheeled base with visible cables and chest panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, hat, arm segments, and the depth of the wheeled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, yellow torso, extended arms, and the structure of the wheeled base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the head, arm, and the mechanical details of the base.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with torso vertical, arms fully extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, head facing forward, and body supported by a wheeled base.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed but features integrated panels and a wide-brimmed hat-like head covering, with decorative elements such as glasses and colored wiring.
attribute_facial_features: The face has large, round eyes with glasses, a small nose, and a simple mouth, all stylized in a cartoon-like manner; the head is topped with a wide, flat hat.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms have multiple visible hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, and wrists, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands have segmented fingers, but no visible legs as the lower body is a wheeled base.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible camera or visual sensor in the face area; no other sensors are clearly visible.
